'''Frak''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Private/Legends|private]] who served the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom]]. He was deployed to help the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] take back the [[Intergalactic Communications Center]] on [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] after being taken by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]. He managed to rescue [[Erk H'Arman]] until he was shot down by CIS [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].
